description: A photograph of dark plastic-wrapped bundles, some stacked on a black pallet and others bagged in gray plastic on a folding table, against a dark mesh backdrop in an indoor facility. A printed placard in the center shows a Customs and Border Protection field-operations seal and text reading U.S. Customs and Border Protection, Office of Field Operations, Laredo Field Office, Port of Laredo, TX.
notable_text: U.S. Customs and Border Protection; Office of Field Operations; Laredo Field Office; Port of Laredo, TX
